name: Ditalini with Flageolets & Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta until al dente.
2. Drain, return to the pan, and toss over a low heat with the oil, beans, and garlic, to warm through.
3. Remove from the heat and stir in the pesto.
4. Serve immediately.
VARIATION: Instead of ditalini, choose a flat pasta such as fettuccine and add a handful of green beans cut into bite-sized pieces to the boiling water when the pasta is half cooked. If yellow wax beans are available, add them too. Toss with the rest of the ingredients as above.
